reviews.comment:
Atencion pauperrima, la proxima cargo nafta en la axion q esta a unos km.

(Translated by Google)
Attention, poor, next time I'll fill up on the Axion which is a few km away.

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada por tradición desde niño. A desbeber, estirar las piernas, mate o café y a seguir.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop, a tradition since childhood. Time to unwind, stretch your legs, have some mate or coffee, and then keep going.
